## Description

What does this PR change, and why? One short paragraph. Focus on the user-facing or architectural impact, not a line-by-line diff summary.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated and `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / CHANGELOG / ARCHITECTURE) if relevant
- [ ] No breaking changes — or breaking changes documented in CHANGELOG
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (when E8.4 lands)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff

## Screenshots

If this PR changes the dashboard or any UI, drop before/after screenshots here. Otherwise delete this section.
